_meta.source: REPRESENTATIVE dual-use / controlled-goods rules — NOT the full Wassenaar / EU dual-use / UAE control list.
_meta.note: Maps HS-code prefixes and description keywords to control categories. Extend with the licensed control lists in the same shape.

8507.60.control: Lithium cells/batteries — IATA/ICAO dangerous-goods handling; permit for bulk export.

8517.control: Encryption-capable comms equipment may be controlled (Wassenaar Cat 5).

2710.control: Hydrocarbons — hazardous goods; jurisdiction restrictions may apply.

9018.control: Certain diagnostic/biological equipment may be dual-use (Cat 2).

drone.control: UAVs / UAV components may be military/dual-use controlled.

encryption.control: Encryption items may require an export licence (Wassenaar Cat 5p2).

aerosol.control: Aerosols are dangerous goods — special handling.
